reviews.text:
Posting on behalf of a family member:
My husband & I have been working with the “BEST team ever” on a slip and fall case.  We just recently finalized our case and received our settlement.
Without getting into specifics of case, we would like to HIGHLY RECOMMEND each of the team members involved with us. Namely, Attny Marty Fritz, Sandra Reed, Anu Nou Saopeng and last, but NOT least, Attny Magali Sunderland whom we dealt with the most.
The Team works like perfection together.  They are entirely TRANSPARENT in all aspects thru-out. They kept us in the loop at all stages and explained everything in layman’s terms.  Each one is totally knowledgeable and highly professional!  It’s obvious their years of experience has paid off for them.
We chose them by researching the Internet and reviews.  We can’t say enough about them as a group and individually.  We just feel blessed that we chose this firm correctly.   Living in  Az  and filing in Hawaii could be a nightmare, however the Team made everything seamless and easy. They continually went “over and beyond” in each aspect of the case.
We just can’t say enough about them and again, recommend them 100%!  In closing, anyone looking for legal help and expect Honesty, Integrity, Character and Knowlegeable, then look no further!
Joe & Donna
Excellent experience. Fritz couldn't be more professional, or more competent, or more caring. A wonderful combination.

We are writing to provide a professional reference for Magali, Marty and Wayne whom we have had the enormous pleasure for their incredible support in handling our case.  At all times they consistently demonstrated exceptional skills, strong work ethic, incredible wisdom and a remarkable commitment to achieving outstanding results.  In addition to their amazing support, the entire law firm team including the legal staff and paralegals, were attentive and proactive. Always reliable and a pleasure to work with!

If you are looking for a team of attorneys who genuinely care and know their stuff, look no further than Trecker Fritz and Williams!

Thank you Magali, Marty and Wayne for the great care!

Tamara Tanner and Isidro Gomez

First of all i would like to thank Atty. Magali Sunderland and Trecker Fritz &
William attorney at Law For fighting for our car accident case it was a very complicated case but through your hard
work and effort case was solved.

Agaran family
Never go here for medical malpractice their interest is only themselves.
reviews.ownerResponse: This person was never client of our firm. We only take cases we believe have merit.

reviews.text: Allen and Fritz supported my sister in that hard time 10 years ago. All my family always very appreciate they help. Now my sister healing well and even though she got baby. Thank you Allen and Fritz! Love
Great to work with!
Great attorney! I highly recommend this law firm. They are the best in the Islands and i got much more from my personal injury than i thought. Thank you so much Marty!
Mark and his team are the standard when it comes to law. They treated me like a VIP and guided me through my whole process. I highly recommend Mark and his team. Thank you again Mark.

Attorney Mark Bridges is among the most capable and talented criminal law litigation specialists in the country. His experience in the military legal system is unmatched.  No attorney in this arena is better suited to protect the rights of a soldier facing criminal charges than the former Chief Judge of the US Army Trial Judiciary.

Over the past 30 years, I have witnessed this attorney's superb litigation skills, sometimes as a colleague and sometimes as an adversary on the other side of the aisle. Always calm, confident and better prepared than anyone else in the courtroom,  I cannot overstate his ability to achieve results for his clients.

Colonel (Retired) Bridges has a distinct advantage over his criminal defense lawyer peers, in that he has served in every role: as a prosecutor, a trial defense counsel, a senior advisor  at the Command level, as an appellate defense attorney and as a Military Judge. Simply put no other litigator in this field can compete with this level of expertise.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks John!  It has been my pleasure working with and against you for all of these years.

reviews.text: Mark came highly recommended and we feel our family was very blessed to have met him.  He is extremely knowledgeable and professional & we feel he went above and beyond for our situation.  From our first meeting, he explained everything to us and was always very responsive when we had questions.  He provided detailed information on our options and worked very hard to get the best result possible.  We would certainly recommend Mark for any of your legal needs.  Thank you so much for everything you did for our family, Mark!  We will forever be grateful!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the review.  It was my honor to work with such great people!  Aloha!

reviews.text: Went above and beyond for me as a lawyer. Was capable of doing everything he said he would do for me, and willing to always push for more even when it wasn’t necessary.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Wil.  It has been my pleasure working with you and doing all we can to get the right result.  I appreciate the review!

reviews.text: Mr. Mark Bridges joined my defense team on a Board of Inquiry. Due to his knowledge, attention to the smallest details, and his aggressive representation on my case, not only was I retained but the board members findings specified that there had been no misconduct committed. With over 17 years of service in the military, retention was vital to me and his experience played a vital role. He went above and beyond to support me and I would definitely  recommend him to anyone needing legal assistance no matter how big or small.
reviews.ownerResponse: I'm glad we got the right result for a fantastic Soldier.  Thank you, and best of luck with the rest of your military career.

reviews.text: After a lengthy, time-consuming, FREE initial consultation I hired COL(Ret) Mark Bridges to file an application with the Army Discharge Review Board to upgrade a discharge.  I’m so happy I did.  His work has been amazing.  Despite the differences in our time zones, he was very responsive.  And his years of service as an Army lawyer make him an expert in his field.  He immediately began employing those distinguishing attributes to my case. Mark understands the Army Discharge Review Board process and he raised every issue available in support of an upgrade.  He took the time to locate former military members and gather the evidence needed to support my appeal, along with interviewing witnesses, gathering letters of support, and reviewing Interactive Personnel Records Management System (iPERMS) and OMPF records.  I’m sure he spent more time on my case than his fee warranted.  Although it will be a while before I know the results, I feel confident that Mark put his "best foot forward” in arguing my case to the ADRB.  My 5-star rating is based on my observations of his work product, responsiveness, knowledge, and professionalism. More importantly, his continued deep respect and passion to support our "own" is second to none!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks guys!  I'm grateful for the review.  It was a pleasure working with you all.

reviews.text:
Getting seriously injured in an auto accident can leave you feeling helpless and vulnerable.
Nathan Roehrig came highly recommended to represent me and I am very pleased.  He was able to settle my case out of court in less than a year.
reviews.authorName: James Pescado Powered by Peak Potential

reviews.text: Nathan P. Roehrig is a professional, competent, and reliable lawyer. He explains and outlines all aspects of the case. He is knowledgable, experienced, and very intelligent with fairly priced services.  I felt prepared and supported throughout the entire process and satisfied with the result of his efforts. I highly recommend him!

I have the utmost respect for Nathan, both as an attorney and as a human being. As a highly effective communicator, Nathan clearly conveyed his intelligence and his knowledge of the law. The intricacies of the law can be head-spinning for nonlegal people (most of us!). Equally as important, he is a compassionate, patient listener. I always understood the information given to me, and I always felt heard, understood, and cared for. Practically from Day 1, I had complete confidence and trust in him and his abilities. We both persevered through Covid and everything else thrown our way!
Near the completion of my case, I asked him about a separate matter. He so kindly and generously gave me his time, answered my questions, and pointed me in the right direction with the offer of further assistance.
I am so grateful he is my attorney. He is highly recommended!

After months of being rebuffed and ignored by other attorneys and institutions, I was referred to Nathan.  He listened carefully to the issues and facts of my situation and responded with compassion and intelligence.  He took my case and through his diligence and effective effort got the attention of the appropriate parties.  Despite the delays and challenges of Covid, he persevered on my behalf throughout.  He was creative, responsive to all questions, collaborative with me and others, and always sensitive to the basis of the case.  I could not think of a better advocate to have, and happily recommend him to any and all that seek recognition and restitution.

Nathan was very knowledgeable and professional throughout my case and even was very courteous and helpful after.  His assistance with understanding of each law and how it applies helped educate and provide good expectations on what the possible outcomes for my personal injury case were.  Highly recommended!

I was referred to Nathan after a motorcycle accident, and i feel so fortunate that i was! His help was immeasurable. My own insurance representative told me that i had no hope for financial protection or recovery due to Hawaii's traffic and insurance laws, but Nathan proved him wrong. His help during this traumatic time, right in the thick of the Covid-19 pandemic, allowed me to concentrate on recovering physically. Thanks Nathan!

Our son's appointed attorney Randall Hironaka does not return calls nor emails. This is very disappointing if this finally gets any attention with this firm pls contact our son as requested and sent via email and voicemail. I will gladly edit this review.

Dang & Staff

I am so grateful for the outstanding support and dedication that Charlie Dang and his staff have shown throughout my case. From the very beginning, Charlie took the time to listen to my concerns, explain my options, and guide me through every step of the process. His professionalism, patience, and responsiveness made all the difference — I could always count on a return call within minutes, which gave me confidence and peace of mind.

The entire team is compassionate, knowledgeable, and committed to doing what is best for their clients. They treated me with respect, kindness, and genuine care, never making me feel like just another case file. Even during the most stressful moments, Charlie and his staff stayed focused and worked tirelessly to protect my interests.

I truly appreciate all that they have done for me, and I would recommend Charlie Dang and his team to anyone in need of a dedicated, trustworthy, and highly skilled attorney. He’s the best!
Tammy E.
Charles Dang is not in Topa financial center. He is across the street of the topa financial center.

Charlie Dang is an exceptional attorney. He always kept in touch with me regarding my case and answered all my questions in a timely fashion. I highly recommend him. He said from day #1 he is a straight shooter and I appreciated his transparency.
Helped me tremendously, straight shooter! Very insightful and got things done!

Beware this guy is a con artist , When a lawyer hides under his desk at work that's a red flag. real lawyers deal with facts not there personal relationships with the insurance companies lawyers.   30 years  of robbing people this guy a crook

Intense Kind of guy.
Personally he gives me anxiety,  like I want him to give anxiety to others...lol

I'VE HIRED CHARLIE DANG SINCE MY BOTH KNEES SURGERY'S MAYBE ALMOST 2 YRS NOW , BEST PERSON THE JOB  , HE DOESN'T WASTE YOUR TIME OR HIS. HE'LL LET TRUE FACT ABOUT YOUR SITUATION  , HIS WORDS IS  BE TRUTHFUL , AND THINGS GONNA WORK OUT FOR YOU .

Mr Charles Dang is very professional and helpful. It does not talk unless needed, straight shooter! He will not waist your time talking nonsense all day long, straight to the point! His stuff is very responsive and helpful too. I was lucky to choose him over any other attorney in Oahu, very happy!
The absolute best attorney on Oahu

What that guy Michael  L., was saying ISN'T TRUE!!!!! Charlie is AWESOME!!!!! He's VERY INFORMATIVE, tells you straight up and doesn't waste anybody's time!!!!! He TRULY CARES about his clients and his staff is AWESOME too!!!!!
Hes amazing and works with people well,

I can say he and his staffs has done great for me. They answered my every call. Even if he isn't in the office the staffs made sure he got the message. Any questions I had they answered me accurately. Will I refer anyone to Charles Dang? I sure will.

Charlie was with Bickerton Dang but he went out on his own.  The negative reviews on here are not accurate in my opinion.  Charlie is the "people's attorney" he truly cares and takes the time to help you.  He doesn't care if your case is big or small, but there are laws that dictate when you have grounds to make a lawsuit or not.  He explains this at the first free consultation so people know what to expect.  Some people get better right away and there is no lasting damage.  That's no fault of your attorney.

He is a very hard worker always at the office unlike many other attorneys I've dealt with before.  I hate when you call and just get their voicemail with no follow up.  Charlie is good at what he does because he only handles personal injury cases for many years.  Everyone I talk to love Charlie and you don't get that kind of reputation from being a flake or being incompetent.

And finally, I give Charlie huge props for being a volunteer police man.  It tells you what kind of guy he is, helping people-- even putting himself in harm's way for the safety of the community.  He's way to humble to take credit for all he's done for the people of Hawaii.  But I thought I'd throw that out there if you have any doubts about hiring him.

Charlie Dang is AWESOME, I had no knowledge of what to do and where to start he was pretty straight forward with me about everything, he made me feel comfortable and confidentin him. He doesn't like to waste time, he is very good with explaining things helping me to understand what is going on with my case by bringing me into his office to go over things and after meeting with him he would send me an email of what we discussed  and always keeping me updated through the whole process. I recommend him to anyone.

Mahalo Charlie!
Good lawyers make the firm. Honest and faithful.
Paul is ok but took a long time to get my settlement

To Robert Miyashita, Cindy, Jacqueline, in a world where trust is hard to find, we’re so grateful we found the best to represent our ‘ohana. Every strategy, every discussion, every advice has led us to victory! We’re beyond blessed!
There’s no doubt in our hearts that this team is the best of the best!! If we could give a million stars that’s what we would do! Truly amazing!!

Ka ‘Ohana Green-Matutino

The entire team never gave up and was very persistent in getting the results I deserved if you’re looking for a team that will be on your side and support you no matter what please contact this law firm I promise you you’ll not be disappointed they go above and beyond to make sure that YOU are taking care of🙏🏼🙏🏼

reviews.text:
I want to express my deepest and most heartfelt gratitude to both of you for the unwavering support, dedication, and hard work you put into my case. From the very beginning, you treated me not just as a client, but as a person going through an incredibly difficult and uncertain time in my life.

Attorney Miyashita, your professionalism, expertise, and steady guidance gave me confidence and reassurance when I needed it most. Your patience in explaining every step of the process, your honesty, and your commitment to achieving a fair resolution meant more to me than words can fully express. Knowing that you were advocating for me allowed me to focus on healing and taking care of my family.

Ms. Uehara, I am especially grateful for your constant support, kindness, and responsiveness throughout this entire journey. You were always there to answer my questions, follow up on details, and provide reassurance during moments of worry and uncertainty. Your compassion and dedication never went unnoticed, and I truly appreciate the care you showed every step of the way.

Because of your combined efforts, my case was successfully settled, bringing closure and relief during a challenging chapter of my life. I am incredibly thankful for the time, effort, and heart you both invested in helping me reach this outcome. Your work has made a meaningful difference for me and my family, and I will always be grateful.

It has truly been an honor to have been represented by an exceptional and dedicated legal team.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for your incredibly kind and thoughtful words, Kat! We are truly grateful that you took the time to share your experience and reflect on your journey with our team.

It was an honor to represent you during such a challenging time, and we are deeply appreciative of the trust you placed in us. Our goal is always to treat every client with compassion, respect, and unwavering advocacy, and your feedback affirms that commitment.

We are so glad we were able to help bring resolution and peace of mind, and we wish you and your family continued healing and the very best moving forward. Thank you again for allowing us to be part of your journey. — Your MOLAW ‘Ohana

reviews.text:
I am so grateful to have had Robert Miyashita from the law firm Miyashita & Osteen as my attorney after my bike accident. I suffered a broken shoulder and a serious concussion, and from the very beginning Robert was supportive, professional, and genuinely caring, treating me like family. He encouraged me to get the medical treatment I needed to heal and handled all the complicated insurance issues so I could focus on my recovery.

Robert worked tirelessly to make sure the truck driver’s insurance paid for my medical bills and worked with my own insurance to maximize my settlement. I always felt that he had my best interests at heart, and his guidance made a very stressful time so much easier. He was always available to answer my questions and his paralegal, Jacqueline Furukawa, kept me updated by phone as to the progress of my case and gave me step by step guidance all the way along.

If you are looking for an attorney who is knowledgeable, compassionate, and truly goes above and beyond for his clients, I highly recommend Robert Miyashita. I can’t thank him enough for everything he did for me!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Aloha Judy,
Thank you so much for your thoughtful review. We're truly grateful for your trust during such a challenging time. It was an honor to help you on your road to recovery, and we're so glad we could make a difference. Wishing you continued healing and all the best ahead.
Your MOLAW Ohana.

reviews.text:
I am pleased to share my experience working with Jeremy O'Steen, an exceptional attorney. His sincerity and genuine care for my case were evident from the outset. Throughout what turned out to be a lengthy process following my auto accident, Jeremy's attention to detail made me feel at ease.

Thanks to his expertise and dedication, I received a favorable settlement offer that exceeded my expectations. If I ever find myself in need of legal assistance again, I would not hesitate to hire him. I wholeheartedly recommend Jeremy O'Steen to anyone seeking a competent and compassionate attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Aloha Emily,
Thank you so much for your thoughtful review! We're grateful you trusted Jeremy with your case, and we're thrilled to hear his dedication made a difference in your experience. Wishing you all the best moving forward!

reviews.text:
We are very fortunate to have Robert Miyashita from Miyashita & O’Steen, LLLC as our attorney for my wife’s bus incident case.

My wife was hit by a city bus. She was hospitalized and in bed for a long time. The incident left her with permanent damage that would impact the rest of her life.

We contacted Mr. Miyashita and were able to meet him the next day. Robert is highly professional and experienced; he is also caring and patient. He took his time listening to the case details, he asked questions and explained what might happen and how he would proceed with this case.

After he accepted the case, he called and emailed us on a regular basis and informed us of the case status. He was always available when we had questions. He is very supportive, and he constantly checked on my wife’s recovery. He demonstrated empathy throughout the legal process and helped us get through the difficult time.

Robert did a thorough job. He was able to collect and review all the evidence from various sources and he made it a strong case. Robert’s negotiating skills are also impressive, he was able to achieve a much higher than expected result.

Many thanks to you, Mr. Miyashita. We truly appreciate all your hard work, thank you for everything you did for this case.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Aloha Ji,
Thank you so much for your kind words and thoughtful review. It was a privilege to assist you, your wife & family during such a challenging time. I'm glad to hear that my support and efforts made a positive difference, and I'm grateful for the opportunity to have worked on your case. Wishing you and your wife continued recovery and the very best.

reviews.text:
Look no further…..if Robert Miyashita will take your case, as he and his partners are quite busy, hire him!  The bottom line is  Miyashita & O’Steen win the cases they accept and do so going above and beyond making sure they are serving their clients needs, not their own!  In the broken world filled with obstacLes of complex legal cases you somehow find yourself facing you need an intelligent group of fighters who have “your back” who know how to navigate the hurdles and complexities of a broken legal system.

As all cases are different and rather than bore you with the details of our families case in this review I think it is best to simply say that Miyashita & O’Steen don’t cut corners and they spend the time necessary to make sure you completely understand what transpires during the cases they accept. Due to the issues you face in a broken legal system that is rigged to help perpetrators (those who injure others either knowing or unknowing) more than injured parties it was extremely important for our family to find the right attorney who cared about our well being above the reward for an injury….that person is Robert Miyashita!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Aloha Bozeman,
Thank you so much for taking the time to leave such a heartfelt and detailed review. We are truly honored to have had the opportunity to represent your family. At Miyashita & O’Steen, our goal is always to go above and beyond for our clients, ensuring that their needs are met and that they feel supported every step of the way through what can often be a complicated and frustrating legal process.

We greatly appreciate your kind words about Robert and the team, and it means a lot to know that you felt genuinely cared for throughout the course of your case. It's clients like you that remind us of why we do what we do—fighting for justice and standing by our clients' sides when they need it most.

Thank you again for your trust in us, and please know that we are always here for you and your family.

Best regards,
The Team at Miyashita & O’Steen

reviews.text:
I have hired this firm on two separate incidents.
The first incident, not knowing how the process works, I called a few different firms to get different opinions.  One firm seen on tv referred me elsewhere which I did not follow, called Turbin Chu and Heidt to set up an appointment, and the third ghosted me on my appointment confirmation.  Once I agreed to their representation I gave them all the information I could give them and they were able to obtain the information I did not have or know about.  Throughout the process I was able to focus on my rehabilitation, I kept in touch through email, office visits (pre-covid), and phone calls.  In the end I was able to get the treatment I needed and "all parties" were able to resolve this case quickly.  I also received some advice that I took that helped my next situation
Second incident (post-covid), I would be SOL if I did not follow the advice received from the first incident.  Long story short, uninsured/underinsured motorists can get away with a lot, leave you SOL, and stuck with the bills.  I called this firm again, rinsed and repeated the process.
I really appreciate the work that this firm has done for me.  Intelligent, experienced, communicated well (goes both ways), and very down to earth when in regular people conversation.

Mahalo Richard, Janice and Malia !
Aloha💯🌈
Richard and Janice was awesome in taking care of my case they were very professional and honest. I am very happy that I have them help me with my case

Alex started out like he cared and knew what he was doing.

He said he'd help with my worker's comp case, which is more unique than most. He introduced me to a chiropractor-- Dr. Gary Helmstetler --who he said would help me as my new PCP. This "doctor" proceeded to make passes at me in our appointments. I consulted Alex for advice regarding how this man wasn't being professional. He told me to "be an adult" because "there's no one else who will help you." I then have to plead with this doctor, telling him directly after he asks too many personal questions, "I really need you to be my professional doctor right now while I'm in such a vulnerable position." He takes that as if I rejected him. The next time I see him, he's cold, hurried, won't answer any of my questions, including asking if he's even looked at my MRI--the polar opposite treatment as he'd given me before. I just wanted neutral. Before I lay on his table, I ask him not to snap my neck, as I only have a back injury, he tells me he won't and then he does, within 5 minutes of agreeing not to. He had adjusted my neck before and it was gentle and corrective. This time it was mean, punishing, and I immediately got a pounding headache. He rushed me out of his office as if it were my fault he just assaulted me.

I tell Alex what happened and how I can't go back to see this man again. He only says, "I suggest that you look for one before you burn this bridge." I share with him the police report number I'd already filed. Alex proceeds to drop me as his client after he reschedules my hearing multiple times, claiming "something's come up," when we both know it's because he screwed up and didn't want to fix it.

A RICO report and investigation later, where they drop the case because it wasn't caught on camera (and why would it be?), it's been over 6 months and Dr. Gary Helmstetler is still blocking me from receiving care for my injury by claiming to be my 2nd PCP. That means I have to go to ANOTHER hearing just to get care, which I've been trying to get for over a year now, but have been blocked at every turn by this worker's comp process, its dictator of an insurance company, and its abusers taking advantage of its victims, like Dr. Gary Helmstetler.

Alex, you said, "being a mermaid doesn't make you special," in a nasty tone, even though I'd never even said it did. My case, however, IS special because I was injured as a mermaid INSTRUCTOR, and just telling the Department of Labor what I did for work resulted in me winning my first hearing. Your own discrimination blinded you being a professional yourself, just like it blinded Gary, who also acted like he cared and knew what he was doing until he actually had to do it. You two deserve each other and,

LADIES,

steer clear of both of these men if you want to do what's best for yourselves.

Fights for your benefits on the right way he could !Explains clearly how the process goes on.Patience and Understanding is the key towards positive goals.

reviews.text:
When the condo owner living above us caused water damage to our condo, we were displaced for nearly two months. When his insurance carrier refused to compensate us for the inconvenience and the temporary housing cost, we hired the law firm of Shim and Chang to help us.

They were easy to talk to, knowledgeable, and very professional. They put together a complete claim package showing the damage to our condo and listing the additional costs we had to incur through no fault of our own. Because they were so highly respected by the other side’s insurance company, they were able to resolve our claim.

We would highly recommend the Shim and Chang law firm.

I was injured while on vacation in Hawaii and actually was referred to Shim and Chang by an attorney that had litigated against them in the past. I was told that if she were in my position that is who she would contact. Immediately that was a plus and a relief for me as I live in Arizona and had no idea where to start. I received a call from Harvey who asked pertinent questions regarding the incident. Immediately I was impressed by his honesty- he wanted to make sure we had a case before going forward- and his thoroughness in the questions he asked. After a couple of conversations, Shim and Chang agreed to take my case. From the start ,everyone I spoke to was kind, caring and made me feel I was important to them.  I felt as though Sharon, Harvey’s assistant,  was my long lost friend. She called often to check on me after surgeries and therapy. They made everything so easy!     I had always heard that attorneys nickle and dime you... not the case whatsoever! I was actually stunned by the extremely minimal costs that were reported at the end of the case.  I was very impressed by this firm from start to finish and I would not hesitate to recommend them to anyone in need of legal assistance. They are truly the best firm I have ever dealt with.
Thank you Harvey, Sharon and all at Shim and Chang who were there for me at a very difficult time. I truly appreciate all that you did for me and my family!

My experience with this team has been exceptional! From the very first meeting they were nothing but professional. I highly recommend them for any personal injury litigation or mediation. Thank you Mr. Chang!

We are not the suing type however dozens of people, including another attorney said we need to do something because we have a strong case.  After the attorney reviewed the brief description that his assistant wrote down he said he is unable to help us because he doesn't believe there's a strong enough claim.  After asking him to further elaborate it came down to the fact that it wasn't a shoe in and dealing with City & County is challenging.  After asking if he wasn't up for challenges he was offended and mocked my husband and his injury. We are extremely pleased with the outcome of our case and have Shim & Chang to thank for it.

reviews.text: Michael is hands down the best personal injury attorney you could ask for! He truly cares about his clients and goes above and beyond to ensure you feel supported every step of the way. One of the things that sets Michael apart is how well-known and respected he is within the court system—this gives him a unique edge that works in your favor. He knows how to navigate the system like a pro, and his reputation speaks volumes. If you want an attorney who is not only highly skilled but also compassionate and committed to your case, Michael is the one to call. I’m so grateful for everything he’s done! Our family suffered a tragic loss from an incident that generated for us many unanswered questions regarding the circumstances leading up to the event.  We contacted Davis Levin Livingston after being given a few references from a friend.  From the first moment that we contacted the firm we were treated with dignity and compassion, and after several conversations with our counsel we felt very confident in having Davis Levin Livingston represent our case.

The team at Davis Levin Livingston were very thorough and detail-oriented in conducting their investigation, going the extra mile in making sure no stone was left unturned.  They were very responsive to our questions, were readily available to meet with us, and gave us timely updates.  They also helped us navigate, prepare, and support us through all aspects of the case.

In the end our family received a final resolution that gave our family some closure.  We will always be grateful for the care and commitment Davis Levin Livingston showed our family.  Their dedication and compassion made a difficult time easier for us, and we highly recommend Davis Levin Livingston to anyone in need of trustworthy, professional, and outstanding counsel.

Her attention to detail is unmatched and her commitment to justice is truly unwavering.

She is incredibly articulate, confident and clear in every explanation, which helped guide us through this complex and emotional process. Her staff is just as wonderful: warm, organized, and responsive, and genuinely invested in our well-being.

What I appreciated most is that she never gave up on us. She fought tirelessly, always with integrity and heart, and helped us reach a settlement, which felt like a huge step in our long process of healing.

If you’re looking for an attorney who is brilliant, compassionate and relentless in the best way-look no further. We are forever grateful.

- Emily and David

In March of 2016, my mother passed away after complications from an endoscopy exam. After getting no reasonable explanation from her physician, I knew I had to get answers somehow. My mom was an otherwise healthy 69 year old with a history of small bowel obstructions. I tried to find the best lawyers in Honolulu and landed upon their website. The legal process is extremely hostile toward ordinary citizens suing doctors or hospitals, but Matthew Winter, Kirsten Bennett, Thomas Otake and all the other amazing people there guided me through the lawsuit and into trial. I owe a debt of gratitude to them, as I now know what happened to my mother. I believe that universal healthcare is long overdue in this country, but until then we need firms like Davis Levin Livingston to help victims of medical negligence in a for-profit healthcare system run by pharmaceutical and insurance companies. Highly recommend them.

Yesterday, I had emailed several law firms, regarding a personal injury I had received from an assault 3 years ago. Due to the circumstances of my case, I knew the chances were slim that I could seek any restitution, but I needed to try, nonetheless. I was very quickly contacted by one of the firm’s attorneys, Jeremy O’Steen, Esq., who spoke with me for quite some time, answering my questions, giving me guidance, and ultimately explaining why I am unlikely to have a case at all. He was very kind, professional, helpful, and he seemed truly sympathetic towards my situation. He recommended that I seek other opinions on the matter, though I would likely receive the same conclusion. Though mildly disappointed (which had nothing to do with anything he did), I was very grateful for his time.
He surprisingly called again, today, with more information and some good news! Though the firm still wasn’t interested in taking my case, Jeremy had called with information and advice that might strengthen my case and help to get representation. I think his kindness speaks highly, as to what kind of person he is, and even greater for how much he cares, as an attorney. The fact that he sought out information after we spoke, yesterday, and not only filed it away in his brain to have for future cases, but CALLED ME to educate me, as well......that is above and beyond. I’m not saying that he (or this firm) will always have time to do this for every case they reject, but I AM saying that I believe that if Jeremy or this firm were to represent you, YOU ARE IN GOOD HANDS.
Thank you, to Jeremy and Bickerton Law Group, for going out of your way to educate me and give me a bit of hope. I wish you all the absolute best, and I appreciate your time.
If you are looking for an attorney who cares, and is dedicated to serving you in the best way possible, Jeremy just might be your guy! I can tell that he is driven to succeed, and that he won’t hesitate to find answers, if he doesn’t already have them. I believe he will strive to do his best as your attorney, and  that he will provide you with all the guidance you need, along the way.

Its funny that "Jay Star" had such a fantastic outcome. I hired Mr. Edward Smith for an almost identical situation back in September of last year. I paid him 5k out of the 7500 he asked for to still be married to this day and trying to figure it out myself. Not one time did I feel like he was on my side. He went to court with me one time for 4 hours (we had to wait our turn), answered a few phone calls and texts, and set up mediation for 5k. I pay 20$ a month for chatGPT and already understand 1000% how to do this process then when he was my attorney. It was like pulling teeth to get info on what to do next. DO NOT HIRE THIS GUY!!!!!!! I gave him 1 star only because it wouldn't let me post this with 0.

Hes going to respond with something like "SC you are very aware with the situation with your case..... these allegations are simply not true. Blah Blah. Do your job and maybe you wouldn't be struggling with your rating on google.

(update 30 Apr 2025) I formally called to discontinue his services so that I could represent my self. If the attorney you hire to represent you no longer is needed, you must ask them to formally withdraw from your case. I did that two weeks ago and he has not done it yet. The proceeds to send me a stock email to catch up because he hasn't heard from me in a while.

Most likely because I haven't given him any more money. When I responded to the email saying please withdraw from my case like I asked two weeks ago, I was replied with a message discussing facts about another case they he had nothing to do with and proceed to tell me how it wasn't his fault. I didn't ask for your counsel on that. Please withdraw from my case NLT 1 May 2025 so that I may be able to represent my self. You are affecting my livelihood. If it continues I will escalate to the Bar association.
reviews.ownerResponse:

Thank you for sharing your experience. I'm sorry to hear about your dissatisfaction and I am committed to addressing your concerns. We aim to offer each client attentive and personalized service, and it's clear that we did not meet your expectations this time. I invite you to schedule a meeting in our office so we can discuss all of your legal matters in further detail and explore ways we can improve your situation. Please feel free to contact us directly at your convenience.
Sincerely,
Edward Smith

reviews.text: I was going through a very ugly divorce and my now ex wife was fighting for everything she could. She even put a restraining order because I was abusing her when eventually was proven that she was the abuser. Mr. Smith helped me through this who process and I won all my cases. I beat the restraining order case which he had one of his colleagues represent me and we won. After that I won my divorce case to where my ex wife got nothing and had 2 months to vacate my house or would be arrested. Mr. Smith is a great attorney and was willing to work out a payment plan with me for his services. It was a long process but as long as you keep in contact with him he will take care of you as he is a very busy man. I am very grateful for him representing me and I would recommend him to any future clients. Thank you again Edward Smith
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your experience. We are overjoyed to hear that we were able to assist you during such a challenging time and achieve a favorable outcome in your cases. We strive to provide dedicated and compassionate service to our clients, and it's rewarding to know that our firm provided the support you needed. It's great to hear that the payment plan was helpful for you. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we are grateful for your trust. Should you need any further assistance in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out. Wishing you all the best moving forward.

reviews.text:
RUN!
I wish I read the reviews before hiring Ed Smith. During the Pandemic my wife contracted him for me and my mother. We wanted a Living Trust set up, and due to living on Maui, we needed this done via Video Chat, and told them it needed done quickly while Mom’s cognitive skills were still there but feared decline. The Trust never got done. Unfortunately, my mother wanted everything under mine and my wife’s name. I didn’t feel comfortable with this having siblings, even though siblings were not there for her. Not once did Ed or his office communicate with my mother, and I didn’t want to be the one who took care of his mother using his wife full time to physically care for her, and being thought of only doing it for the money.
The Trust never happened, she passed, and kicking myself for not listening to mom’s wishes. She knew I’d do the right thing.
After sometime of her passing I contacted the office and explained that they never did the Trust, and was told the the Thousands of dollars I paid could go towards Probate.
Unfortunately, things got ugly, to day is Court, and my sister will be named in charge of the Probate.
I explained that my mother wanted me to be in charge knowing that I would do the right thing. My sister had hired a lawyer and I wanted Ed to fight for me to be in charge. His recommendation was to let my sister sell one of the properties. Feeling like I had my hands tied, I reluctantly agreed knowing I needed to fire him.
Even after paying him off nearly $10,000 and saying’we are finished!’, he contacted not only me, but the court system telling them I said to sell the property, which wasn’t my wish.
Ed gets Paid either way, Win or Lose, and feeling like a loser, almost regretting all that I had done for my mother and brother, to be stabbed in the back by family. No regrets, I did it for them, and only hoped that his children and my siblings would appreciate all I have done, giving both of them the best possible final times.
Ed Smith charged me for the Trust, the Probate, and then several other charges were made. These other charges were never discussed, never sent, and actually I believe were written and back dated after I had accidentally forwarded him a letter stating that he was no good and needed to be replaced. These other charges were never mailed, emailed, or discussed.
Today is court, my sister will be in charge, and selling 3 houses to the cheapest bidder. I also had hoped to go through my childhood home and save some memories.
After taking care of not only my mother at the end, but my brother who battled cancer I’ve discovered that no good deed goes unpunished.
Families can be awful. Get your affairs in order.
If you are reading this review RUN!
* Note* the 5 star reviews must be paid reviews. Read them all, and RUN!

He ended up padding the bill when asked for a refund of the retainer. Charged me for text messages and emails that he never responded to including messages listed below were I requested my funds be returned.

"You are negatively impacting my ability to secure legal counsel and leaving me with no other

options but to explore pursuing a civil case against your firm.
If my money isn't returned this week, I'll be pursuing a civil case as well as filing a complaint

"Are you planning on returning the funds at all?

"Good morning,

I think everyone can see the trend. I strongly advise looking elsewhere for a lawyer.

He failed to do what he promised was a simple process, after paying him approximately $2,000 a month for 16 months. I’m military and had to PCS before the divorce could be finalized. I provided him with ALL the necessary paperwork and Edward Smith still missed simple deadlines which created fines from the court. It also created animosity in the court room. Which in my opinion caused the judge to not take my case seriously. I had to fly back to Hawaii in July 2023 because he told me that if I was to be physically present in court and my ex was not there, then it would default in my favor. This was not the case. I was there, my ex was not, and the case was dismissed as if nothing ever happened.

I flew back to Hawaii from Virginia, and the case was thrown out. When I returned to home to Virginia I filed again and had to redo the entire process on my own because I was out of money. I essentially taught myself how to file for divorce, resubmitted all the divorce paperwork in Virginia, had my ex served, gained full custody of my two boys, successfully had a restraining order put on my ex and was divorced in 3 months later.

What I did on my own in THREE months he failed to do in 16 months!! DO NOT HIRE HIM!

reviews.text:
Mike and Kelly really took care of me. After a horrendous accident due to someone else running a red light, I was left with injuries and a ton of questions. Kelly made sure I knew how things would proceed and took great care communicating and gathering all information. Mike was so easy to talk to and ensured I was fairly compensated. They also handled all medical correspondence which was a life saver.

Thank you again!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the kind words, Ryan, it was a pleasure for us to be able to work for you.  Mike and Team

reviews.text: Thank god for local boys like Yamane and he is a lawyer. He has a paralegal,Jamie Grimms who is on it like a hornet. She’s really good keeping  clients in the loop. And getting things done. I live in Arizona but while visiting mom for her 89 birthday we were driving thru and intersection and Bam!!! Airbags deployed it happened so fast and thru the powdered micro fiberglass air that filled the vehicle my 89 year old mother moaned in agony. Long story short we survived. Time has passed my mom’s hip gives her problems on the daily. For myself something tore inside my rt shoulder. We decided to seek advise thru LYS attorney at Law. I felt so at home with yamane and his small kind pigeon slang. No worry sista…He is true to his word of  what he was gonna be able to do for us. Thank you Mr Yamane and paralegal Jamie grimms
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Dee! Thank you so much for your kind words. We are truly glad we could be there for you and your mom during such a tough time. It means a lot that you felt at home with us. We wish you both all the best in the future!
Aloha-John, Jamie and LYS Team

reviews.text:
I’d like to send a huge “Thank you” to attorney John Yamane and paralegal Jamie Grimm for their professional, committed legal services in assisting and guiding me on my father’s case who was an 88 year old pedestrian accident victim who lost his life.  From my initial video call with John Yamane, who explained and outlined the whole process in detail, I knew I was working with the right person.  The continuous emails from paralegal Jamie who always kept me in the loop and responded promptly to my questions made the days go by faster and showed true dedication to my father’s case.  If you are in need of personal injury legal services, I highly recommend the team of John Yamane and Jamie Grimm! Thank you again to both of them and although I miss my father dearly,  with John and Jamie’s assistance another chapter has finally closed for me!
Tracie Uyechi
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Tracie,
Thank you so much for your incredibly kind review. It truly means a lot to us that you felt supported and informed throughout such a heartbreaking time. We know how much your father meant to you, and it was an honor to help guide you through the legal process and bring some closure.
Jamie and I were both deeply committed to your father’s case, and we are grateful for the trust you placed in us. Wishing you continued strength and peace.
Aloha-John, Jamie and LYS Team

reviews.text: I highly recommend Stuart Kodish and the legal team at Leavitt, Yamane and Soldner! Stuart, his secretary Rachel, and Tris were very knowledgeable and persistent in my injury case. Stuart navigated every detail and was always one step ahead. Him and his team’s approach and support made all the difference in achieving a favorable outcome for me and my family. He always got back to me and was very responsive. If you’re looking for a lawyer who cares and doesn’t stop fighting for you, Stuart and the team at Leavitt, Yamane and Soldner are the ones to call! Five stars!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Matthew,
Thank you so much for your generous words and recommendation. It was a privilege to work with you and your family. I’m glad our team could support you every step of the way. I truly appreciate your trust in us and am happy we were able to achieve a strong outcome together. Wishing you all the best moving forward! Stuart, Rachel and LYS Team

reviews.text: I would like to be thankful for the help of Mr.Stuart Kodish and his secretary Ms.Rachel S. Otto.  I've got hit by a car while cycling and they were pretty helpful and patient to work with me through out my case , which was very complicated.  They helped me to understand and navigate through the judiciary system and hospital services and bills. reviews.text: Jan Weinberg has helped our family and represented my mother in a personal injury case.  He is extremely knowledgeable and knows the law inside and out.  His guidance helped us in a settlement that helped to pay for my mothers medical bills.  His reputation as an attorney who will fight for you is accurate.  Thank you Jan.

After my son’s moped accident in Hawaii, we were overwhelmed and unsure of what to do next — especially learning that Hawaii is a no-fault state with limits on what insurance will pay for personal injuries. It felt confusing and discouraging at first.

Hiring Jon was the best decision we made. He walked us through the state laws, explained the insurance caps, and fought to make sure my son’s medical bills were covered. In the end, he also secured a settlement for him. We truly felt supported every step of the way and are so grateful for his knowledge and guidance. I would highly recommend Jon Jacobs!

I cannot recommend Jon Jacobs highly enough. After my burn injury, I was overwhelmed, in pain, and unsure of my rights. I was guided through every step with patience, compassion, and exceptional professionalism.

Communication was clear and consistent, my questions were always answered, and I truly felt that my case mattered. Jon fought for a  more than fair outcome and made a very difficult period of my life far less stressful.

If you need an attorney who is knowledgeable, responsive, and genuinely cares about their clients, this is the one.

In 2024, I was involved in a serious motorcycle accident caused by a reckless driver, which resulted in severe injuries and an extended hospitalization. Throughout the entire legal process, Jon and his team were consistently professional, attentive, and patient. They took the time to explain each step clearly and ensured my case was handled with care and diligence. I feel that I was fairly compensated for my injuries, and I would highly recommend Jon and his team to anyone seeking legal representation after an auto or motorcycle accident.

Jon and his team helped me with my auto injury case. From day one...they made things simple and a breeze. First time ever needing legal advisory, and Jon told me..."you do what you need to do on your end and he and his team would take care of the rest". They sure did, kept me posted on what was going on every step of the way,and also accomodated my busy schedule. Big shout out to Maritess(Tess)...for keeping me coordinated throughout the process aswell.Greatful and thankful for Jon and staff. Definitely will recommend his firm to family and friends. Much mahalos to the Law Office of Jon S.Jacobs.

Jon & His Team
Are great they would explain every thing  in detail
i was injured by a medical procedure gone wrong my ordeal lasted 4years for an out come ,But Jon would always reassured me that i had a case and always  included me on any decisions to be made .
he always would advise me on what was best for my family and i
I would Highly recommend them with out hesitation.

Please re think having this attorneys office represent your case. I spoke to a man on the phone today that took the consults for the cases. One of the rudest people Iv ever spoke to on the phone. I briefly explained my accident to him and he stated the office wouldn't take my case. When I KINDLY asked him what cases do they take since their website said "Personal injury attorney", HE GOT INCREDIBLY RUDE WITH ME, RAISING HIS VOICE AND STATING " I DIDNT SAY YOU DIDNT HAVE A CASE, I SAID **WE** WOULDNT TAKE YOUR CASE, DO YOU WANT THIS PHONE NUMBER OR NOT"  and when I asked why he was getting angry, he raised his voice again. I hope this man doesn't represent the whole law office because I would never recommend anyone to this office because of him.
Jon was very professional and such a pleasure to work with.  He got me the best outcome and I highly recommend his services.
Jon has help me with two cases and I must say he did an awesome job and helped me every step to get it settled!

My experience with Jon Jacobs was nothing but exceptional. First my case was denied from the larger attorney offices but they suggested him. He listened to my case and took it on. He walked me through everything even while recovering from a brain injury. He was kind and understanding. He always checked in on my recovery process to see if I was making progress and doing well. He did not make me feel rushed at all and fought to make sure I received  the compensation that was owed to me, while the insurance companies were trying to take advantage of me. 100% would recommend. It felt really good to have someone like Jon fighting for me.

It took years for my legal matter to be resolved, but I never felt forgotten. Jon was incredibly kind and patient throughout the process. I always felt he genuinely cared and worked hard to be the best advocate he could be for me.
Jon handled my slip and fall case. He was thorough and the outcome was better than expected. Would recommend Jon if a  lawyer is needed for your personal injury case.

Jon Jacobs is very personable, is very prompt in returning calls/emails, knowledgeable, and a respected local attorney. I was injured in a hit and run during a visit to Pearl Harbor and live out of State. Jon was very tenacious and guided me through the 3 year ordeal. Jon negotiated the best possible outcome. I am forever in his debt. A truely genuine and caring person.

A Legal Lifesaver!

I recently had the privilege of working with Jon Jacobs, and I can't express how grateful I am for their exceptional legal expertise. From the initial consultation to the resolution of my case, Jon demonstrated unparalleled professionalism, dedication, and a deep understanding of the law.

What sets Jon apart is their ability to listen attentively and communicate complex legal concepts in a way that was easy for me to understand. They took the time to thoroughly assess my situation, providing clear and realistic expectations from the beginning. This transparent approach helped me feel confident and informed throughout the entire process.

Not only did Jon showcase a profound knowledge of the law, but their strategic thinking and attention to detail were also evident at every stage. It was evident that they genuinely cared about my case and worked tirelessly to achieve the best possible outcome.

In addition to their legal prowess, Jon and his team were consistently responsive and communicative. Any questions or concerns I had were addressed promptly, and I felt supported every step of the way.

Thanks to Jon, my legal matter was resolved with the best possible outcome. I wholeheartedly recommend their services to anyone in need of a dedicated and skilled attorney. If you're looking for a legal expert who combines expertise with genuine care for their clients, Jon S. Jacobs is the way to go!

I am most fortunate to have had the guidance and care of Jon Jacobs and his wonderful staff.  I was given Jon's number from a friend's daughter, who practices medical billing law.  Essentially through the coconut wireless.
Jon displays what aloha is.  He wanted to know who I am, not just standard facts, but where is my place in the community, how did my injuries not only affect me but those who care about me.  I felt safe and heard and protected.
Jon and his staff's tenacity got to the bottom of what entity was responsible for my injuries.  Not an easy task when dealing with huge corporations, but they brought in that big ulua.
I can't give enough mahalos to this very caring man.

I have so many great things to say about Jon S. Jacobs,  he helped me when the other lawyers couldn’t. My case was two years old and I wasn’t getting anywhere with anyone. But Mr. Jacobs was able to work with me and the other guy to get me a fair amount for my car accident. And in a good time frame too. I greatly appreciate everything he did for me to get the most for my injury. He actually cared about my case and didn’t just have me settle at the first offer to they came at me with. Mr. Jacobs always kept me updated on everything he did and didn’t beat around the bush on anything. Overall I would recommend Jon S. Jacobs to everyone. And Again, if I haven’t said it enough already thank you for everything you’ve done for me.

My experience with Jon S. Jacobs was everything I was hoping for to resolve my case. The bigger law firms wouldn’t take my case, but referred me to Jon S. Jacobs, Attorney.
Jon is very up front with his information and knowledge. He is easy to talk too and very professional with a great respect for his clients. I would recommend Jon in a heartbeat to others in need of an Attorney for a bodily injury case.

I would Highly recommend The Law offices of Jon S. Jacobs. Jon and his team took great pride and care in representing myself. They gave me a lot of 1 on 1 time and stayed in contact with me the whole time.  They made The process effort less/smooth especially for a year like 2020 and made sure I was fairly compensated.

I have nothing but great things to say about Mr. Jacobs and his team. They helped me resolve all legal matters after a terrible car accident. Not once did I feel alone; they kept up with everything and worked extremely hard to get me the best possible deal. Speaking with them was a breeze and always a pleasant time even though it was under unfortunate circumstances. I actually don’t even live in Hawaii, I live in NJ, and even then it was very easy and stress-free. Thank you so much! It was a pleasure to work with such a great group of people.

Jon was very nice, easy to talk with and also very professional.  We were referred from a big law firm since they couldn't take care about us due to a small case.  Many other lawyers whom I had consultation with said it won't be possible to recover the costs that my mother incurred by the accident from the hospital.  So many of them didn't take time with us and just said you just need to ignored the bills.  So, we almost lost hope to recover the costs and pay the significant bills to the hospitals.      However, Jon did not give up and negotiated with other lawyers for a long time, and finally we received the satisfied amount of compensation.
Thank you Jon for helping my mother in Japan.  I highly recommend him!

Spoke to David and he calmly listened/and asked questions regarding my worker's comp case. I had spoken to two other attorneys who were
uncaring and damn right rude, like they were working for the other side. Although David couldn't take my case, he gave me advice and I appreciate his understanding and time.
Mahalo David!
Mahalos 🤙🏽for EVERYTHING YOU AND YOUR TEAM DID!!!!.……
Thank you
Zero stars. Ex-judge Gail Nakatani was extremely biased to the point of violating the law. I dont think DPR should be in operation, and Ms. Nakatani needs to be terminated for good.

The arbitrator failed to remain impartial and did not attempt to resolve their issues, and we would not recommend DPR to anyone.

Janet Carlson’s Review
Services Provided by Attorney John O’Connell
July 1, 2021

John O’Connell contacted me through an attorney referral in 2017 and greatly helped me in a lengthy personal injury legal matter that was successfully resolved in 2021.

His professional services made a positive impact on my case, culminating in a fair settlement. John was kind, patient and supportive throughout the legal process. He was a good listener, showed empathy and built a solid base of trust. He was especially adept at communication, calling me directly whenever there was a new development in the case. Throughout the negotiation phase, John was very protective of me which always made me feel safe and secure. Because my medical bills ran past my ability to pay, it took an incredible weight off of my shoulders, to know that John’s guidance throughout the legal process resulted in a favorable outcome.

John advised me with a lot of compassion and understanding. I always felt he was truthful with me. When the case got tough, I felt John was aggressively prepared for all outcomes. John went out of his way to make sure I was taken care of throughout the process, from driving me to the airport, to setting up hotels and flights, to making sure I was accommodated for all medical appointments. He prepped me well before every legal proceeding. John and his associates created the ultimate dream team to have on my side.

It is my sincere honor to recommend John O’Connell and his firm Lee, Myers & O’Connell, LLP for any case involving personal injury matters.

We want to thank you soooo much to Blake Goodman staff and your entire office.  You were all kind and helpful and worth every penny. A smile every time we walked in. ..and a warmth welcome can ease every ones stress of that day...

reviews.text: Reached out to this lawyer about advice and I was willing to pay the hourly rate for it.  I got a response back saying he’s not interested in representing me. I sent an email to clarify that I didn’t want him to represent me and I only wanted consultation and I never heard back. How a lawyer treats potential clients is very telling to what kind of representation you’ll receive. I would look elsewhere and steer clear.

I cannot say enough good things about Darin. He is exceptionally organized, prompt, and skilled at law. We interviewed over a dozen lawyers before hiring Darin. He was the ONLY lawyer who was not intimidated by the powerful law firm hired by our opponents. His confidence was well placed, as he absolutely destroyed every argument they tried to fling at us. I was beyond impressed and would recommend him without hesitation.

Solid group and Selena/Faith are great. Pretty easy process. I was in a car accident and had to get surgery over a year later. They stuck with me even after all my claims were paid out. I miss-filed a lot of bills under the wrong insurance which made things complicated. They worked with me for 3 years to get it cleared up, which was probably way more than they were getting paid for. They could have just cut me loose and I couldn't have complained, but they didn't. It was only over about 2-3k but they settled all of it. Everything was done through e-mail as well. It's bad enough being off your feet for several months and these guys made the process so much easier. Hope to never use them again lol. Thanks guys!

I’ve known Leighton Hara probably longer than anyone I know besides about 5 other people that I can remember. What I can remember from all those years was that he was fun to be around and really smart and always was a problem solver. Being a son of HBA myself and also Leighton has shaped him into the man he is today. There is no one I would trust more than Leighton when it comes to integrity and getting the job done right. Integrity and respect is universal currency and Leighton is a man that is wealthy in that category. I would trust him with my life. Mahalo

I spoke with Eric Elkind to inquire legal advice on a condo issue. I was immediately laughed at and told to look elsewhere. I guess this is how some people choose to go about conducting their business?

At the top of the game. I would recommend Mr. Carroll to any that would ask and some that don't. He is a wealth of knowledge and associates with the who's who of Hawaii.

Didn't help at all didn't help get money back that was with held by workmans comp that left me broke for almost 3 years didn't help fight for me

My case started in June with a different lawyer. When I switch to her (Rhoda Alvarez) I gained confidence in my case she was asking question my old lawyer did and it made me have a very strong case. I ended up winning my case because of her.

My husband and I did a consultation with her regarding trust. When we did the consultation, she didn’t give us any options. She only told us that she will be doing individual trust. She charged so much higher than others and rushed us to pay. We asked her if there’s a joint trust, she told us there’s none came to find out there is a one. It is our first time doing this, we thought she would explain what trust is and what other options we can do but she didn’t. She kept mentioning about divorce throughout  consultation. All she care about is how much you’ll pay her.

We asked her for refund; she charged us $350 for 1 hour consultation and $90 service fee for debit card. I wouldn’t recommend her!!!
G HH

reviews.text: My husband and I are looking for attorney who can answer our question about buying land in the Philippines, but it seems like my husband is more knowledgeable about the law in the Philippines. She sounds like we care more about saving money while the reasons we consult her is to save time sending documents to the Philippines. She seems rush to end the conversation and not interested to listen to our concerns. We felt a little insulted by her tone.

Chelsey was fantastic. Blown away at the service. We had to transfer our three timeshares into a trust. The attorney said it was a big deal. Hawaii is a pain to work with and I may take months to accomplish. Well…not true for us.  Hawaii Deed got it done in record time all via email and at a reasonable cost. I highly recommend them.
Chelsea at Hawaii Deed was professional and efficient.  We are grateful for her quick responses to our questions and thorough work! Thank you.
Unbelievably stress free process! Chelsea was a wonder to communicate with and I highly recommend their service. Absolute best!
Fast and efficient service!

I live in Korea and their service was so globally excellent!
Everything went good, and their response was super fast.
The price was reasonable too.

I had an outstanding experience with Hawaii Deed from start to finish. I first reached out on 1/20 and received a response the same day. The entire process was handled online through email communication, making everything incredibly convenient and stress-free from the comfort of my home.

The entire team was professional, responsive, and efficient throughout the process. A special shout-out to Chelsea, who I communicated with via email — she was absolutely amazing. She answered all of my questions promptly (at no additional cost) and made everything easy to understand.

I even made errors on the onboarding form, and they were quick to assist and correct everything without any issues. The deed was completed on 1/26, printed and notarized that same day, and sent back immediately. By 1/30, I had already received the official recorded copy of the deed. The turnaround time was truly impressive.

Hawaii Deed exceeded my expectations in every way. Their professionalism, speed, and clear communication made what could have been a complicated process completely seamless. I highly recommend Hawaii Deed to anyone looking for reliable, efficient, and high-quality deed services.
I was very happy with Chelsea's assistance and the whole process to update my deed.  It was clear and fast. I will definitely use them in the future.

They transferred title to my house with no problems. Chelsea and the rest of them respond quickly to email and texts, even during this holiday season. They completed my task quickly with no problems and assisted me with legal questions. I would highly recommend them.

I could not be more pleased with the service provided by Chelsea at HawaiiDeed LLC.
Chelsea made the process to execute and record a Quit Claim deed far easier than I would have expected. Questions I had with legal language and options of survivorship were explained thoroughly. The courtesy and professionalism I experienced from Chelsea and HawaiiDeed was top notch!
Was very fast and had fair prices that didn’t break the bank. Felt professional.
Fast, easy, professional. I looked into many options for my deed work and I thoroughly endorse the folks at Hawaii Deed

The folks at Hawaii Deed were AMAZING!  We had tried to get our timeshare property transferred to our family trust numerous times over the last 2 years and it was so complicated!  I contacted Hawaii Deed and within a matter of days the transaction was executed and we now have our correct Deed in hand! Now I can rest easy that our children can avoid probate!  Thank you especially to Chelsea, who made this such a great experience!  Worth every penny!
Extremely efficient and helpful. Was a seamless process and I sure appreciate their help. I will be using their services again in the future!

The team at Hawaii Deed were exceptional in helping with our transaction.

The Onboarding Form, covered the details in our document, the drafting of our deed, we reviewed prior to finalizing the document, the online Notary, enabled us to sign with ease and our document was recorded efficiently.

We highly recommend their services and look forward to working with you again in the future!
Competent, fast, error-free service.

From the first phone call to the completed transaction...they were wonderful!  Professionalism to the highest level.  Special thanks for Chelsea's great communication skills!  Thank you again Hawaii Deed

Super efficient and easy process.  These folks were really on it and worked through a complicated situation with ease.  All the pieces were in place including the notary process which was completed on line.  Can't say enough about HawaiiDeed!
Staff there are very knowledgeable, helpful and easy to speak with. I felt very comfortable and at ease when finished speaking with them and confident with the outcome. Ray
I had a great experience consulting with this firm. They’re knowledgeable, friendly and look out for the best interest of the client

I was informed by my landlord’s lawyer that my year lease would be terminated due to a breach in the contract committed by another roommate. I called the Sarkissian Law group and spoke with Carlos.

Carlos was  patient and very interested in helping me. He calmed me down and got me to look at the problem one step at a time. He ensured the law group would give me legal advice if I had a case they could pursue. They reviewed the termination letter, lease, and many more documents. Unfortunately, it was determined the landlord was in the right and the termination would need to proceed.

Although I never pursued legal advice and action with Sarkissian Law Group, my interaction with Carlos was very personable and calming during a time when I was so stressed. The law group never pushed for money from me. They talked with me and reviewed my case for free. They always followed up with phone calls or emails after each conversation. It felt like they wanted to help me just out of the goodness of their heart… True aloha spirit.

For this reason, I gained a lot of trust in this law group. I would gladly pay for their legal advice if I had a good case for them.

I would HIGHLY recommend anyone to give them a call for landlord-tenant issues in Hawaii. Carlos and the rest of the law group has your back!
reviews.ownerResponse: Mahalo for the insight and details. Our doors are always open for you and OUR Community!

Chenise was respectful of my small business finances and has truly made legal services accessible to a business like mine. reviews.text: It's great to know that there is a company out there that can help small local businesses. Chenise helped review the lease to start up my medical practice in Honolulu HI.  I was leasing into a large commercial building that has strict requirements for their tenants. Chenise helped me to know what is customary with office buildings and what leeway I might have for negotiation as a new tenant.
It was a very comfortable and pleasant experience overall with her detailed explanation and knowing from experience what I should ask for as a medical practice. Since it is a mixed use building, I was surprised at some of the language that was left on the lease as "standard" but really does not make sense for my line of business. If the terms weren't asked for in the lease, or even earlier at the letter of intent, then the building might not let me practice my full scope of medicine as intended. Chenise helped to make sure that the terms were fair for both parties.
Do yourself a favor - protect yourself and your business by getting your lease reviewed by a professional from the beginning.

Chenise is fantastic. She’s a consummate professional, honest, fair, clear, focused, thorough, timely, kind, wicked smart and exactly the kind of representation you want in your corner. I’ve had some poor experiences with legal counsel in the past and Chenise restored my faith in finding the right person. If you’re reading this, that means you’re considering. I highly advise you save yourself some time and book a consultation with her. You won’t regret it.

reviews.text:
As a retired veteran with permanent disabilities, several health conditions gradually affected my ability to maintain proficient and acceptable performance at work.  I could not sustainably engage in such work activities until the early retirement age of 62, much less 65 or 67, to claim regular Social Security benefits.  I took an early retirement from work and sought the legal advice of Attorney Danielle Beaver.

Attorney Beaver’s Leadership, expertise, and personal care quickly embraced my situation, explaining the details regarding Social Security Administration benefits and the differences in eligibility criteria and processes from the Veterans Administration, and gladly accepted my case.

Her attentiveness to my situation regarding my deteriorating health and my inability to find or maintain equitable employment quickly led to the application for Social Security Disability Benefits.  Attorney Beaver’s expertise in the field, perseverance, and proactiveness resulted in the timely receipt of the disability benefits.  Her legal team, as a whole, is proactive and always prioritizes our best interests in securing the benefits we deserve from the Social Security Administration.

Sometimes, we believe that what we receive is all we have but discussing it with Attorney Beaver and her team might be worth your time! It certainly was for me!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Victor. Such a pleasure to help you and so happy such a deserving person prevailed.

reviews.text: Danielle kept me informed. She was great at preparing my son to go to court. My son won his case so I am grateful. Danielle was very kind. I would recommend her to anyone seeking a social security disability lawyer.

Attorney Steve Cedillos provided outstanding legal representation for me during a TRO hearing. From the very start, he demonstrated professionalism, thorough preparation, and a clear understanding of the law. He took the time to explain the process in detail, prepared me for what to expect and realistic outcomes.

I would strongly recommend Attorney Cedillos to anyone seeking a reliable, experienced, and effective attorney in the Hawaii area.

I call Steve's number after hours and he answered right away.  He provided me with answers to my legal questions and did not rush me off the call.  He took his time and gave me very detailed instructions on how to prepare myself in case the worse happened.  I really appreciated him taking time out of his evening to take my call and provide me with a consultation at no charge. Thanks Steve! Jon

This guy was awesome, he spoke to me for about thirty minutes and told me that I probably didn’t need his services. He could have charged me anyway so I appreciate that.

I had a recent case I needed a lawyer for. I had a domestic violence/child abuse issue and I took my kids and left Hawaii back to my home state of Washington. I filed paperwork in Washington, while my ex was filing paperwork in Hawaii. I decided to get a lawyer in Hawaii as well as Washington and when looking up Oahu lawyers, I came across Steve's office. He had lots of experience in family law so I called up his office. I was able to talk directly to Steve upon my very first call and I told him I was needing to get the jurisdiction changed to Washington. Steve worked with myself, my lawyer here in Washington, and the judge in Hawaii. Steve was professional, knowledgeable, and on it from the get go. He was able to fight for my kids and I to stay protected and safe in Washington away from my abusive wife. I'm so glad I found Steve and decided to go with him. He and his assistant Betty worked with me and was able to get exactly what we needed and asked for. If I ever need a lawyer on Oahu again, or for anyone looking currently for a good lawyer on Oahu, Steve and Betty are the best choice. 10 out of 10, would recommend. Thank you Steve and Betty for keeping my family safe and near friends and family. You two are the best.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks David,  I appreciate the kind words.
